name: SugarCraft
description: Elm-architecture TUI runtime — Model / Msg / Cmd / Program. Cursed cell-diff renderer for SSH bandwidth.

name: CandySprinkles
description: Declarative styling + layout. Style, Border, Table, List, Tree, Layout::join/Place, multi-layer Canvas.

name: HoneyBounce
description: Damped spring physics + Newtonian projectile sim. The animation engine behind every smooth scroll in the stack.

name: CandyZone
description: Mouse-zone tracker. Wrap rendered chunks, get back bounding boxes — clickable regions without coordinate math.

name: SugarBits
description: Fifteen components: TextInput, TextArea, ItemList, Table, Tree, Viewport, FilePicker, Progress, Spinner, Cursor, Help, Key, Paginator, Stopwatch, Timer.

name: SugarCharts
description: Sparkline, Bar, Line, Heatmap, Scatter, TimeSeries, Streamline, Waveline, OHLC, plus Sixel / Kitty / iTerm2 image rendering.

name: SugarPrompt
description: Form library — Note, Input, Confirm, Select, MultiSelect, Text, FilePicker, multi-page Groups, six themes.

name: CandyShine
description: Markdown → ANSI renderer. Word-wrap, OSC 8 hyperlinks, syntax highlighting, eight themes, custom themes via JSON.

name: CandyKit
description: CLI presentation helpers — StatusLine, Banner, Section, Stage, HelpText. Library-only, no Symfony Console requirement.

name: CandyWish
description: SSH server middleware framework. Logger, Auth, RateLimit, BubbleTea — leans on OpenSSH ForceCommand for the wire protocol.

name: CandyMetrics
description: Telemetry primitives. Counter / Gauge / Histogram, four backends (InMemory, JSON, StatsD, Prometheus textfile), CandyWish session middleware.

name: CandyLog
description: Colorful leveled logger. Debug / Info / Warn / Error / Fatal with structured context, Text / JSON / Logfmt formatters, and sub-loggers.

name: CandyPalette
description: Terminal color profile detection + ANSI / ANSI256 / TrueColor conversion. StandardColors and ProfileWriter.

name: CandyMosaic
description: Image-to-cell renderer — Sixel, Kitty, iTerm2, Unicode half-block; Picker facade; ext-gd.

name: CandyVt
description: In-memory virtual terminal emulator. ANSI byte stream → cell grid + cursor + mode state.

name: CandyVcr
description: Record + replay candy-core sessions — JSONL/YAML cassettes, Recorder hook, Player + Byte/Screen assertions, CLI.

name: CandyPty
description: PTY primitive for Linux + macOS — open / spawn / read / write / resize / size / setBlocking, Child lifecycle, SignalForwarder.

name: CandyLister
description: Tree/list view with box-drawing prefixes, cursor navigation, word-wrap, and filter-as-you-type.

name: SugarBoxer
description: Box-drawing layout engine. H/V panel composition with weighted sizing, borders, and nested grids.

name: SugarVeil
description: Terminal overlay compositor. Push/pop overlay views with z-ordering, positioning, and per-overlay teardown.

name: SugarCrumbs
description: Navigation breadcrumbs. Immutable NavStack with push/pop, shell-change detection, and type-ahead filter.

name: CandyHermit
description: Fuzzy finder overlay. Type to filter a list, arrow keys to select, Enter to confirm. Bubbletea Model wrapper.

name: SugarTable
description: Full-featured interactive data table — port of Evertras/bubble-table. Column definitions, StyledCell ANSI formatting, pagination.

name: SugarReadline
description: Interactive prompts — Text, Confirm, Selection, MultiSelect, Textarea. State-machine model, no external readline dependency.

name: SugarCalendar
description: Interactive month-grid date picker. Keyboard navigation, min/max date constraints, locale day names, ANSI rendering.

name: SugarToast
description: Floating notification overlays. Info / Success / Warning / Error types, configurable position and auto-dismiss.

name: SugarStickers
description: FlexBox layout engine + simple sort/filter table. Ratio-based sizing, gap, justify, align, per-column styling.

name: CandyMold
description: composer create-project skeleton — counter Model + bin + tests. Pour your model into the mold and you've got a working app.

name: CandyShell
description: Composer-installable CLI of thirteen subcommands — choose, confirm, file, filter, format, input, join, log, pager, spin, style, table, write.

name: CandyFreeze
description: Code → SVG screenshot. Traffic-light window controls, drop shadow, gutter line numbers, ANSI SGR parsing. No GD / Imagick.

name: SugarGlow
description: Markdown CLI viewer. Renders to stdout or opens a fullscreen pager. Eight themes, custom JSON themes, OSC 8 toggle.

name: SugarSpark
description: ANSI escape-sequence inspector. Labels SGR / CSI / OSC / DCS / APC / SS3 — feed it stdin, get a human-readable annotation back.

name: SugarWishlist
description: SSH endpoint launcher. YAML / JSON directory of ssh user@host shortcuts, interactive picker, pcntl_exec into the chosen ssh.

name: SugarSkate
description: In-memory key/value store with plugin backends. Memory, SQLite, Badger. Glob listing, TTL, batch operations.

name: SugarPost
description: Email sending library. SMTP + Resend API transports, attachments, HTML + plain-text multipart, fluent interface.

name: CandyServe
description: Self-hostable Git server over SSH (authorized keys), Git daemon, and HTTP. Users, repos, access control, optional LFS.

name: SugarCrush
description: AI coding-assistant chat shell. Pluggable Backend interface — wire to Anthropic / OpenAI / Ollama via a wrapper script.

name: CandyTetris
description: Tetris clone — SRS rules, 7-bag RNG, ghost piece, NES scoring, level-driven gravity. 41 tests / 1535 assertions.

name: SuperCandy
description: Dual-pane file manager. Tab-swap focus, multi-select, sort cycling, hidden-file toggle, delete-with-confirm.

name: SugarStash
description: Three-pane git TUI — status / branches / log, single-key stage / unstage. Shells out to git for every mutation.

name: CandyQuery
description: SQLite browser TUI — list tables, peek at row data, run ad-hoc queries. SQLite-only at v1.

name: SugarTick
description: Privacy-first coding-time tracker — JSONL on disk, SugarCharts-driven dashboard. No cloud, no MongoDB.

name: CandyMines
description: Minesweeper — customisable board, recursive flood-fill, win/lose detection. Pure-state Board; first-click safety.

name: CandyFlip
description: ASCII GIF viewer — ext-gd decode, downsample to a cell grid, render as ANSI 24-bit blocks or ASCII.

name: HoneyFlap
description: Flappy-Bird in your terminal — bird motion is a HoneyBounce projectile, pipes scroll left at a fixed cell rate.
